creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
I don't think the patch is correct -- you are only requesting a
BUILD dependency here, where I assume you want to use winemaker
after installation?
                                                                                
There is no build issue as far as I can tell, and I am wondering whether 
to actually remove winemaker from the installed version of this package
to avoid having to add another dependency which is not used otherwise.
                                                                                
Do you see a strong need to have winemaker installed?  Any other options
to address this?

Gerald
